padlet.submitDesc: See an easy fix? File a quick JFI and put it in the priority queue.
padlet.padletDesc: Review and vote on submitted ideas on the interactive virtual wall.

jfi.title: Submit a JFI
jfi.desc: Record improvements and earn Streak XP

boardgame.title: NEW: Process Board Game
boardgame.desc: Experience the true cost of Motion Waste in our new interactive dice simulation. Roll to produce!

bottleneck.title: Spot the Bottleneck
bottleneck.desc: Apply the Theory of Constraints. Can you analyze process cycle times and identify the true limit to throughput?

macro.title: PC Macro Builder
macro.desc: Automate repetitive digital tasks instantly. Generate Multi-Action Scripts for standard PC work.

spot.title: Spot the Waste (DOWNTIME)
spot.desc: Can you identify all 8 types of Lean waste in our latest visual observation simulation? Sharpen your 'Lean eyes' now!

r1.title: Round 1: Chaos
r1.desc: Numbers 1-100 are scattered. No organization. Can you find 49 in order?

r2.title: Round 2: Sort
r2.desc: Removing the "Muda". Numbers 50-100 are gone. Does your speed improve?

r3.title: Round 3: Visual Management
r3.desc: Adding a 3x3 grid to help region searching.

r5.title: Round 5: Detection (Chaos)
r5.desc: 2 numbers are missing from the chaotic view. Count-up timer.

r6.title: Round 6: Detection (Standard)
r6.desc: 2 numbers are missing from the perfect grid. Instant feedback.

lesson1.title: Sort
lesson1.desc: Removing what you don't need (50-100) instantly clarifies the "work area".

lesson2.title: Set in Order
lesson2.desc: The standard grid eliminated the waste of searching and motion.

lesson3.title: Visual Controls
lesson3.desc: Identifying a missing item in a grid took {{timeStandard}}s vs {{timeChaos}}s in chaos. This is why shadow boards work.

spot.title: Spot the Waste
spot.intro: Observe the work area carefully. Can you spot the hidden DOWNTIME wastes? Click on the parts of the image where you see inefficiencies.
spot.success: You successfully identified all {{count}} forms of waste in this area.

gps.title: GPS Motion Tracker
gps.subtitle: Auto-traces your walking path via mobile GPS

spatial_hub.subtitle: Advanced space management, layout builders, and motion tracking.

gps.title: GPS Spaghetti Tracker
gps.desc: Live motion tracking via mobile GPS

manual.title: Manual 2D Tracker

feedback.title: We value your input!
feedback.desc: Your feedback helps us build the ultimate tool for Lean leaders.
feedback.placeholder: Describe what happened or your idea here...
feedback.successDesc: Your feedback has been recorded. Let's keep kaizening!

portal.jfiDesc: Submit your "Just Fix It" improvement idea in 2 seconds.
portal.gembaDesc: Linked to all videos around the world.
portal.executionDesc: Manage projects, roadmaps, and daily action items.
portal.perspectiveDesc: 3D scanning, floor plans, and motion tracking analysis.
portal.trainingDesc: Master Lean principles through simulations and academy courses.
portal.communityDesc: Connect with Lean experts and share lifestyle hacks.
portal.executionGuide: Start a **Project Charter** in the Execution Hub to set your goals.
portal.spatialGuide: Capture your current state using **Spatial Tools** to find waste.
portal.trainingGuide: Play a **Simulation** to learn how to eliminate the waste you found.
portal.mobileDesc: Scan this to access Kaizen Copilot on your mobile device (must be on the same network).
portal.auditDesc: Create and flip printable TPM task cards.
portal.signageDesc: Plant-wide visual standards and vector assets.
portal.shareDesc: Invite your team via QR Code or direct promo link.
portal.lswDesc: Design an intentional daily and weekly leadership time budget.
portal.qrDesc: Scan this QR code or copy the link below to invite your team. The link opens our Top 5 Promo Page.

quotes.text: Searching for car keys for 2 mins every single morning
quotes.impact: Equal to a whole extra day of leisure time reclaimed annually.

quotes.text: Pre-sorting laundry into whites and darks at the point of use
quotes.impact: Saves 13 hours a year of 'batching' and sorting effort.

quotes.text: Putting your car keys on the exact same hook every day
quotes.impact: Reclaims 2 full Saturday mornings spent tearing couch cushions apart.

quotes.text: Organizing your fridge so the oldest milk is always on the left
quotes.impact: Avoids annual 'spoiled milk' surprises by keeping dates visible.

quotes.text: Setting out your workout clothes next to the bed at night
quotes.impact: Reclaims 30 hours of 'morning decision fatigue' per year.

quotes.text: Using a dedicated 'landing zone' for mail and house bills
quotes.impact: Eliminates late fees and the stress of missing critical documents.

quotes.text: Meal prepping for just 1 hour on Sunday afternoons
quotes.impact: Saves 260 hours a year—equivalent to 10 full days of time!

quotes.text: Charging all devices in a single nightly 'docking station'
quotes.impact: Ends the 'where's my charger?' panic for good.

quotes.text: Keeping a small trash bag in the car door bin
quotes.impact: Prevents the 'Big Car Clean-out' every single weekend.

quotes.text: Standardizing the kitchen spice rack by frequency of use
quotes.impact: Reduces 'searching waste' by 8 hours annually while cooking.

quotes.text: Setting your morning alarm 50 feet away from the bed
quotes.impact: Eliminates 30 hours of 'drifting' per year; immediate productivity.

quotes.text: Unsubscribing from 10 retail 'Junk' emails today
quotes.impact: Saves 18 hours of 'digital sorting' time per year.

quotes.text: Creating a 'donation box' in the closet for immediate sorting
quotes.impact: Eliminates the 'Sunday declutter' stress entirely.

quotes.text: Using clear bins for seasonal storage with large labels
quotes.impact: Saves 8 hours a year of 'rummaging' for holiday gear.

quotes.text: Automating 5 monthly bill payments to autopay
quotes.impact: 6 hours a year regained for focus on high-value personal goals.

quotes.text: Putting a magnetic shopping list pen on the fridge
quotes.impact: Captures 100% of grocery needs without walking to the office.

quotes.text: Synchronizing family calendars on a shared digital app
quotes.impact: Eliminates 24 family scheduling conflicts per year.

quotes.text: Labeling the 'mystery' power cords in your junk drawer
quotes.impact: Prevents the 'unplugged-the-wrong-thing' catastrophe.

quotes.text: Keeping a set of pre-packed gym clothes in the trunk
quotes.impact: Removes the 'going home' friction, increasing health by 50%.

quotes.text: Storing the vacuum cleaner on the main living floor
quotes.impact: Doubles the frequency of cleaning with 50% less effort.

quotes.text: Digitizing all paper receipts immediately via phone camera
quotes.impact: Turns tax prep from a nightmare into a 15-minute task.

quotes.text: Using a 'One In, One Out' rule for every new clothing item
quotes.impact: Maintains closet capacity with zero extra organizing effort.

quotes.text: Shadow-boarding the most used tools in the garage
quotes.impact: Saves 4 full work days over 5 years of searching for tools.

quotes.text: Pre-packing your kids backpacks at 7 PM sharp
quotes.impact: Ensures no 'forgotten homework' and a calm start to 180 days.

quotes.text: Keeping a small umbrella by every single exit door
quotes.impact: Reclaims 2 hours a year otherwise spent drying off or searching.

quotes.text: Buying household consumables (soap, TP) in 6-month batches
quotes.impact: Eliminates 12 emergency 'oops' trips to the store.

quotes.text: Folding laundry while the dryer is still warm
quotes.impact: Eliminates the need for ironing 90% of your wardrobe.

quotes.text: Setting up a 'return-to-store' bin in the car trunk
quotes.impact: Ensures 100% of returns happen during normal errands.

quotes.text: Grouping similar apps into folders on your phone home screen
quotes.impact: Saves 6 hours a year of 'mindless scrolling' fatigue.

quotes.text: Doing a '10-minute tidy' every night as a family
quotes.impact: Reclaims 365 hours of morning productivity for the house.

quotes.text: Printing a 'House Guest' Wi-Fi info sheet
quotes.impact: Saves 2 hours a year of repetitive technical support.

quotes.text: Cleaning the shower with a squeegee daily after use
quotes.impact: Saves 26 hours a year of 'heavy scrubbing' maintenance.

quotes.text: Setting all house clocks 5 minutes fast
quotes.impact: Eliminates the 'late-arrival' stress tax on your reputation.

quotes.text: Kitting your carry-on bag with permanent toiletries
quotes.impact: Eliminates 'did I pack the toothbrush?' anxiety for every trip.

quotes.text: Organizing the freezer by protein type with clear labels
quotes.impact: Saves 12 hours a year of 'guessing what's in the foil'.

quotes.text: Using a 'digital burner' email for one-time signups
quotes.impact: Keeps your main inbox clean, saving 15 hours of cleanup a year.

quotes.text: Scheduling all medical appointments in a single block
quotes.impact: Reduces 'travel waste' by 50% for annual checkups.

quotes.text: Pre-chopping vegetables for 15 mins after shopping
quotes.impact: Makes healthy cooking the 'path of least resistance' daily.

quotes.text: Standardizing your morning coffee setup the night before
quotes.impact: 18 hours a year regained for focus before the day starts.

quotes.text: Using a single 'master' grocery list shared on your phone
quotes.impact: Saves 35 hours a year of 'doubling back' through aisles.

quotes.text: Color-coding the family bath towels
quotes.impact: Reduces laundry volume by 20% by preventing 'clean' towel washes.

quotes.text: Implementing a 'Wait 24 Hours' rule for online shopping
quotes.impact: Eliminates 'impulse waste' and preserves 10 hours of return effort.

quotes.text: Using a voice assistant to set immediate reminders
quotes.impact: Captures 100% of tasks at the point of thought, no 're-thinking'.

quotes.text: Pre-filling the coffee maker water reservoir
quotes.impact: Reduces 'morning fumble' waste by 12 hours annually.

quotes.text: Storing lawn tools on a wall-mount vertical rack
quotes.impact: Reclaims the floor space and 2 hours a year of 'shuffling'.

quotes.text: Creating a digital 'Reference' folder for instruction manuals
quotes.impact: Eliminates the 'physical paper' clutter in the office.

quotes.text: Standardizing the placement of your gym bag in the hallway
quotes.impact: Reduces the 'searching' barrier to exercise by 18 hours a year.

quotes.text: Checking your car tire pressure monthly
quotes.impact: Saves $150 and 2 hours of 'emergency repair' time per year.

quotes.text: Using a dish wand with soap built-in for quick rinses
quotes.impact: Prevents the 'pile of dishes' backlog by cleaning as you go.

quotes.text: Consolidating all paper mail into one digital scanner app
quotes.impact: Reclaims 48 hours of 'paper-filing' headache every year.

quotes.text: Turning off all non-human phone notifications
quotes.impact: Reclaims 180 hours a year of 'distraction waste' and focus.

quotes.text: Using a password manager for all digital logins
quotes.impact: Eliminates 'password reset' loops and 4 hours of annual frustration.

quotes.text: Cleaning your desktop downloads folder every Friday
quotes.impact: Saves 8 hours a year of searching for 'that one file'.

quotes.text: Setting up a 'Read Later' folder for web articles
quotes.impact: Reclaims 120 hours of productive daytime from 'rabbithole' reading.

quotes.text: Using 'Text Replacement' shortcuts for your email address
quotes.impact: Saves 2 hours a year of repetitive typing on mobile devices.

quotes.text: Archiving all emails over 30 days old today
quotes.impact: Reduces 'inbox anxiety' and reclaims 15 mins of daily sorting.

quotes.text: Standardizing your file naming convention (YYYY-MM-DD)
quotes.impact: Saves 10 hours a year of 'which version is this?' waste.

quotes.text: Using two monitors for office or hobby work
quotes.impact: Reclaims 200 hours a year of 'window switching' and tab-toggling.

quotes.text: Pre-writing template replies for common questions
quotes.impact: Saves 40 hours a year of 're-inventing the wheel' for messages.

quotes.text: Setting a 'Scheduled Summary' for phone notifications
quotes.impact: Batching 50 interruptions into 1 saves 45 mins of daily focus.

quotes.text: Canceling 3 unused digital subscriptions today
quotes.impact: Saves the 'mental load' of tracking 3 unnecessary expenses.

quotes.text: Using a 'Quick Access' pin for your 5 most-used folders
quotes.impact: Saves 12 hours a year of navigating deep file paths.

quotes.text: Setting a 'Digital Sunset' time for all screens
quotes.impact: Improves daily energy levels by 20% through better rest.

quotes.text: Using a dedicated 'To-Do' app instead of sticky notes
quotes.impact: Eliminates the 'scavenger hunt' for lost paper lists.

quotes.text: Batching all social media usage into 2 time-slots
quotes.impact: Reclaims 365 hours—over 15 full days—per year!

quotes.text: Standardizing your computer's desktop wallpaper to neutral
quotes.impact: Improves 'first-click focus' by 5 mins every morning.

quotes.text: Using a 'Do Not Disturb' physical sign for deep work
quotes.impact: Saves 20 mins of 'recovery time' for every avoided tap on the shoulder.

quotes.text: Learning 5 keyboard shortcuts for your most-used app
quotes.impact: Saves 15 hours a year of 'mouse-travel' waste.

quotes.text: Emptying your computer's trash bin every Monday morning
quotes.impact: Prevents 'disk full' emergencies at critical project moments.

quotes.text: Using 'Pin to Top' for your current active project folder
quotes.impact: Saves 5 hours a year of 'drilling down' into directories.

quotes.text: Self-hosting a 'personal wiki' for family knowledge
quotes.impact: Eliminates the 'Mom, where is the...?' cycle forever.

quotes.text: Auditing your phone's contact list for duplicates
quotes.impact: Saves 2 hours a year of 'texting the wrong number' waste.

quotes.text: Using a 'Pomodoro' timer for focused 25-min bursts
quotes.impact: Accomplish 8 hours of work in 6 through extreme focus.

quotes.text: Setting up a 'Template' folder for common document types
quotes.impact: Saves 20 hours a year of formatting and 'starting from scratch'.

quotes.text: Unlinking your social media from your work browser
quotes.impact: Eliminates 30 hours of 'micro-procrastination' annually.

quotes.text: Standardizing the 'Leftovers' container size
quotes.impact: Saves 5 mins of 'fridge-shuffling' every single night.

quotes.text: Using a dedicated 'Bread Station' with toaster and jam
quotes.impact: Reclaims 12 hours a year of 'kitchen-wandering' for supplies.

quotes.text: Pre-rinsing dishes and stacking by size for the dishwasher
quotes.impact: Increases dishwasher capacity by 20% and saves 30 hours a year.

quotes.text: Storing heavy flour and sugar bins on pull-out rollers
quotes.impact: Reduces back strain and speeds up baking prep by 5 mins.

quotes.text: Using a 'FIFO' (First In, First Out) rack for canned goods
quotes.impact: Saves $200/year in wasted groceries and 2 hours of 'date-checking'.

quotes.text: Grouping all 'Coffee & Tea' supplies in one cabinet
quotes.impact: Saves 6 hours a year of 'brewing ritual' travel waste.

quotes.text: Pre-boiling water in an electric kettle before the stove
quotes.impact: Reduces 'waiting waste' by 15 hours a year for pasta and soups.

quotes.text: Using a magnetic knife strip instead of a drawer block
quotes.impact: Reduces 'searching' and protects blades for 5 years longer.

quotes.text: Batch-cooking 2x protein portions every Monday
quotes.impact: Ensures healthy mid-week meals with zero extra cleanup.

quotes.text: Labeling the 'Open Date' on all condiments
quotes.impact: Eliminates the 'is this still good?' hesitation for 50 items.

quotes.text: Using a compost bin with a foot-pedal lid
quotes.impact: Reduces 'cleanup motion' by 50% during heavy vegetable prep.

quotes.text: Standardizing the 'Dinner Table' set-up process
quotes.impact: Teaches kids 'standard work' and reclaims 18 hours a year.

quotes.text: Storing the most-used pans on the stovetop hooks
quotes.impact: Eliminates the 'loud-cabinet-clash' search every morning.

quotes.text: Using a vegetable peeler that works in both directions

quotes.text: Buying pre-washed spinach and greens in bulk
quotes.impact: Removes the 'processing' hurdle to daily healthy eating.

quotes.text: Setting a 'Grocery Day' schedule with the same route
quotes.impact: Reclaims 26 hours a year of 'aimless aisle-wandering'.

quotes.text: Using a single 'Master Spice' blend for quick seasoning
quotes.impact: Eliminates the '10-jar juggle' for 300 dinners a year.

quotes.text: Pre-filling the dog's water bowl at the same time as yours
quotes.impact: Reduces 'extra trips' to the sink by 365 per year.

quotes.text: Standardizing the 'Clean Dish' hand-off to kids
quotes.impact: Everyone knows where the plates go—no 'where does this live?'.

quotes.text: Using clear glass jars for frequently used dry goods
quotes.impact: Instantly see when you're low on rice—zero 'out-of-stock' stress.

quotes.text: Keeping a 'Snack Box' at eye-level for healthy choices
quotes.impact: Reduces 'pantry-gazing' time by 5 mins every afternoon.

quotes.text: Using a silicone mat for easy baking cleanup
quotes.impact: Eliminates the 'scrubbing' waste and saves $30/yr in parchment.

quotes.text: Kitting the 'Pizza Night' supplies in one bin
quotes.impact: Turns a chaotic kitchen into a 5-minute family activity.

quotes.text: Storing the cutting board vertically against the wall
quotes.impact: Reclaims 2 sq-ft of workspace and 20 seconds / meal.

quotes.text: Using a multi-timer for complex holiday cooking
quotes.impact: Prevents 'burnt turkey' catastrophes through visual management.

quotes.text: Shadow-boarding your 5 most common desk tools
quotes.impact: Stops the 'where is the stapler?' hunt in mid-flow.

quotes.text: Using a 'Standing Desk' to increase afternoon output
quotes.impact: Eliminates the 'post-lunch slump' waste for 200 days a year.

quotes.text: Standardizing your 'New Project' folder template
quotes.impact: Ensures every project has a 'Leads' and 'Assets' folder instantly.

quotes.text: Moving the printer to the center of the office
quotes.impact: Reduces 'walking waste' for the whole team by 10 mins daily.

quotes.text: Using 'Read Receipts' to eliminate 'Did you get it?' pings
quotes.impact: Saves 20 emails a week of pure overhead communication.

quotes.text: Setting a 25-minute 'Default' for all meetings
quotes.impact: Reclaims 2 hours of team output every single week.

quotes.text: Using a dual-monitor setup for spreadsheet work
quotes.impact: Saves 100 hours a year of 'alt-tab' eye-strain and errors.

quotes.text: Labeling the 'Empty' vs 'Full' paper tray
quotes.impact: Prevents 'printer-jam' frustration for the entire staff.

quotes.text: Standardizing the 'Out of Office' message format
quotes.impact: Ensures customers always have the right contact, 100% of the time.

quotes.text: Using a 'One-Touch' rule for physical mail
quotes.impact: Decide: File, Action, or Trash immediately—don't let it pile up.

quotes.text: Using 'Reply All' only when 100% necessary
quotes.impact: Reduces 'noise waste' for the entire company by 50%.

quotes.text: Standardizing your email subject lines (ACTION, INFO, URGENT)
quotes.impact: Saves 15 hours a year of 'what is this about?' scanning.

quotes.text: Using a physical 'Inbox' tray for all pending paperwork
quotes.impact: Captures 100% of physical inputs in one visual location.

quotes.text: Setting a '5-Minute' rule for small tasks
quotes.impact: If it takes <5 mins, do it now—saves 40 hours of 're-thinking' a year.

quotes.text: Standardizing your 'Meeting Minutes' format
quotes.impact: Ensures 100% alignment on action items immediately.

quotes.text: Using 'Quick Parts' in Outlook for repetitive paragraphs
quotes.impact: Reclaims 2 full work weeks per year of typing overhead.

quotes.text: Labeling the 'Project' vs 'Reference' files in the cloud
quotes.impact: Instantly identifies where active work lives—zero searching.

quotes.text: Standardizing the 'File Naming' for all team versions
quotes.impact: Prevents the 'I worked on the wrong version' catastrophe.

quotes.text: Using a 'Buffer' 5-min gap between all calendar invites
quotes.impact: Reduces 'context-switching' stress for 250 work days a year.

quotes.text: Archiving 'Done' projects into a separate folder
quotes.impact: Keeps your 'active view' focused on the 20% that matters.

quotes.text: Using a 'Shared Clip' tool for team assets
quotes.impact: Saves 50 hours of 'Hey, where's the logo?' pings per year.

quotes.text: Setting your 'Deep Work' status in Slack/Teams
quotes.impact: Reclaims 2 hours of 'maker time' daily from 'manager' pings.

quotes.text: Using 'Rules' to auto-sort your inbox as it arrives

quotes.text: Standardizing the 'New Hire' onboarding checklist
quotes.impact: Ensures 100% consistency and faster 'time to value'.

quotes.text: Using 'Pin' for your 3 most critical browser tabs
quotes.impact: Saves 1 min every time you switch tasks—6 hours a year!

quotes.text: Setting a 'Recurring' task for weekly system backups
quotes.impact: Protects 10,000 hours of work from a single drive failure.

quotes.text: Using 'Dark Mode' to reduce eye strain and battery waste
quotes.impact: Improves 'focus endurance' for long coding or writing sessions.

quotes.text: Standardizing the 'Version Control' commit messages
quotes.impact: Instantly identifies 'why' a change was made 6 months later.

quotes.text: Using 'Search' instead of 'Folder Drilling' (Win+S)

quotes.text: Deleting 10 gigabytes of 'temp' files today
quotes.impact: Speeds up every application launch by 2 seconds.

quotes.text: Using 'Dictation' for long-form brainstorming notes
quotes.impact: Captures the 'speed of thought' without the 'typing bottleneck'.

quotes.text: Standardizing the 'Team Signature' for uniformity
quotes.impact: Ensures every client interaction feels professional.

quotes.text: Using 'Focus Mode' (Win+N) during critical presentations
quotes.impact: Prevents 'personal notification' pop-ups in front of stakeholders.

quotes.text: Shadow-boarding your 'Morning Routine' (gym, prep, coffee)
quotes.impact: Eliminates 'morning decision fatigue' entirely.

quotes.text: Standardizing your 'Evening Tidy-up' sequence
quotes.impact: Resets the house to 'State A' for 365 productive mornings.

quotes.text: Using 'Batching' for all home errands (one loop)

quotes.text: Standardizing the 'Mail Processing' station by the door

quotes.text: Using a 'Grocery Hub' (all food in one visual place)

quotes.text: Shadow-boarding the 'Cleaning Cabinet' by frequency

quotes.text: Standardizing the 'Kid's Shoes' landing zone

quotes.text: Using a 'Charging Valet' for all family phones at 8 PM

quotes.text: Standardizing the 'Emergency Info' sheet on the fridge

quotes.text: Using a 'Laundry Sort' bin with 3 compartments

quotes.text: Standardizing the 'Dog Walk' bag (leash, bags, treats)

quotes.text: Using a 'Donation Station' in the garage (always ready)
